sourceMovie.title: My Name Is Nobody
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: My Name Is Nobody works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and western blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: They Call Me Trinity
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Name Is Nobody clicked for you, They Call Me Trinity (1970) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and western, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My Name Is Nobody?
faq.answer: Try They Call Me Trinity, ¡Three Amigos!, Trinity Is Still My Name—each shares DNA with My Name Is Nobody while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My Name Is Nobody?
faq.answer: My Name Is Nobody (1973) is best described as Comedy, Western. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My Name Is Nobody worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
